description: Create a fully constrained 3D parametric mockup of the Raspberry Pi 4 PCB in SolveSpace. The model must feature an 85.0 mm wide by 56.0 mm high rectangular board extruded to a depth of 1.6 mm. Include four mounting holes, each with a 2.75 mm diameter, positioned 3.5 mm from the corners (specifically, the left holes 3.5 mm from the left edge and 3.5 mm from the top/bottom edges, with the right holes spaced 58.0 mm horizontally from the left holes). Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/rpi4_mockup.slvs. Sharp 90-degree outer corners are acceptable.
